differential_diagnoses: Atrial fibrillation with underlying conduction disease
next_steps: Echocardiogram to evaluate structure, function, and wall motion abnormalities
Continuous cardiac telemetry and Holter monitoring to characterize the rhythm and confirm atrial fibrillation
Serologic testing for Borrelia burgdorferi and Coxiella burnetii
Discontinue all herbal supplements and monitor liver function tests
Cardiac MRI to assess for myocardial inflammation or fibrosis
Serial ECGs to monitor for progression of the atrioventricular block
